source: CB2CF- A Neural Multiview Content-to-Collaborative Filtering Model for Completely Cold Item Recommendations

concepts.finding: CB2CF: neural content-to-collaborative filtering for completely cold items. Learns mapping from content features (text, image) to collaborative embedding space. Cold-start item projected into CF space using content. Once interactions accumulate, transitions to collaborative embedding. Outperforms pure content-based and pure CF for cold-start.
concepts.implication: Map keyword text content to co-occurrence embedding space via learned projection. Cold keyword: extract text features (char/word n-grams, BERT), project to space where similar warm keywords reside. As co-occurrence accumulates, refine from graph context.
concepts.open_question: What content features best predict the co-occurrence neighborhood of a keyword? Can we learn a content-to-embedding mapping from warm keywords?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A learned content-to-embedding mapping for cold keywords achieves 70%+ of the intent cluster quality of warm keyword embeddings with full co-occurrence data.
